channel.title: LuxeMia - Indian Ethnic Wear
channel.description: Shop quality Indian ethnic wear - bridal lehengas, wedding sarees, sherwanis, anarkali suits, and jewelry at LuxeMia. Flat rate shipping $25 per order, free on orders over $350.

item.g:description: An elegant sky blue georgette lehenga choli crafted with intricate sequins, designed for the modern Indian bride. Pair this designer lehenga with statement jewellery for Diwali, Karva Chauth, Navratri & festive parties. item.g:title: Art Silk Off White Groom Wear Thread Work Readymade Sherwani — White (LXM-MIW-030-38)
item.g:description: When the occasion calls for something unforgettable, this answers. Art Silk Off White Groom Wear Thread Work Readymade Sherwani Meet the Art Silk Off White Groom Wear Thread Work Readymade Sherwani - a beautifully crafted sherwani made for groom wear celebrations. Whether you're dressing for a wedding ceremony, a festive reception, or any celebration that calls for something extraordinary, this piece delivers the perfect balance of heritage, elegance, and contemporary style. The Fabric Art Silk. Artisan-crafted artificial silk that mirrors the lustre and drape of pure silk at a more accessible price point, without compromising on visual impact. The Work Thread Work. Delicate thread artistry that creates subtle texture and dimension - a testament to the patience and skill of traditional Indian craftsmanship. Why You'll Love This Piece Colour: A carefully selected Off White tone - flattering across skin tones, stunning in photographs, and rich under both natural and indoor lighting. Fabric: Art Silk - chosen for its drape, longevity, and the way it makes the wearer feel as good as they look. Occasion: Crafted for groom wear - equally beautiful at intimate family gatherings and grand celebrations. Silhouette: Designed to move with you, not restrict you - flattering across a wide range of body types. Provenance: Sourced from India's finest textile regions and curated by our boutique team for exceptional quality. Styling Notes This is the kind of piece that photographs beautifully and feels even better in person. Common Questions What occasions is this sherwani suitable for? This sherwani is crafted for wedding ceremonies, reception events, and any celebration that calls for regal menswear. What sizes are available? This sherwani is available in sizes 38-44. Please select your size when ordering. How do I care for this fabric? We recommend dry cleaning to preserve the embroidery and fabric quality.
